hook.name: LittleJohnBondingHook
hook.description: A bonding-launch Uniswap v4 hook extending LittleJohnHook with a graduation milestone: once ETH absorbed (derived from post-swap sqrt price and fixed launch liquidity) reaches a threshold, emits BondingGraduated. Only the factory's initial liquidity add is permitted per pool; all subsequent adds revert. Fees are taken via return-deltas and minted as ERC-6909 native-ETH claims to LpLockerV4.
